mainEntity.name: What is included in Desert Safari?

acceptedAnswer.text: Desert Safari includes hotel pickup and drop-off, professional English-speaking guide, all equipment, refreshments, and a 24/7 WhatsApp support line.

mainEntity.name: How long does Desert Safari last?

acceptedAnswer.text: The standard Desert Safari duration is 3–6 hours depending on the package selected. Overnight packages are also available.

mainEntity.name: Is Desert Safari safe for children?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Desert Safari is family-friendly. Children aged 4 and above are welcome. Our guides are trained in first aid and safety protocols.

mainEntity.name: What should I wear for Desert Safari?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comfortable clothing and closed-toe shoes are recommended. Sunscreen and sunglasses are advised for daytime tours.

mainEntity.name: How do I book Desert Safari?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can book Desert Safari directly on our website or via WhatsApp at +971544735060. Instant confirmation is provided for all bookings.

mainEntity.name: Can I cancel or reschedule my Desert Safari booking?

acceptedAnswer.text: Free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before the tour start time. Rescheduling is available up to 12 hours before departure.
